name: Beer Runner
short_description: Control talented super robot. Collect all coins and stars every map to unlock portal to finish levels. Also beware traps and collect beer bottles
detailed_description:
STORY:

Player controls talented super robot in this 3rd person platformer game. Every level mission is to find all coins and hidden stars. After finding all of those, then portal will be unlocked and level can finished. Also every level there is 1 beer bottle and by finding that player get steam achievements. Beware different traps like moving laser beam, laser turret and also moving objects. Walling from map or hitting to water will kill player. After all 3 lives used game is over and need start again. Player also has 5 minutes time to find all coins and stars every level. If time goes till 0 game is over

FEATURES:

  • 11 levels

- End of level  beer bottle which gives steam achievements

- Different traps like: laser cannon, moving and rotating laser beams etc

- Moving platforms

- Collect all coins and stars levels to unlock portal and finishing levels

  • 5 minutes time to finish levels
